market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Luxury Villa w/ Private Hot Tub – Sleeps 4
Modern Villa, Hot Tub, Prime Location – £310/night
Stylish 4‑Guest Villa + Outdoor Hot Tub – Book Now
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your modern, stylish villa – a private oasis perfectly suited for up to four guests. Every inch of this entire‑home retreat has been designed with contemporary comfort in mind, from sleek furnishings to floor‑to‑ceiling windows that flood the space with natural light. The highlight? An outdoor hot‑tub nestled on a secluded patio, offering a perfect spot to unwind under the stars after a day of exploring the city. 

Inside, the open‑plan living area features a comfortable sofa, a large flat‑screen TV for entertainment, and high‑speed Wi‑Fi so you can stay connected or stream your favorite shows. The fully equipped kitchen includes a stovetop, oven, microwave, and all essential cookware, allowing you to prepare meals just the way you like them. A spacious bedroom provides a queen‑size bed with premium linens, while a second bedroom offers a double sofa bed, ensuring a restful night for everyone. 

Guests rave about the immaculate cleanliness and thoughtful touches – a 4.95 rating from 186 reviews speaks for itself. Although the host, Muhammad, is new to Airbnb, his dedication to providing an exceptional stay shines through every detail. At £310.40 per night, you’ll enjoy a premium experience that feels like a boutique hotel at a fraction of the cost. Book now and experience the perfect blend of luxury, location, and relaxation.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor hot‑tub listed as an amenity
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, high‑resolution image of the outdoor hot‑tub as the cover photo – it instantly showcases the villa’s standout feature and draws guests in.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate is £310.4, which is +101% above the city median (£154.6) while occupancy is only 33.7% (vs. median 47.8%); consider a price adjustment or added value to boost bookings.
The listing has no description; adding a 200‑300 word, SEO‑rich description will improve search visibility and conversion.
No amenities are listed despite having a hot‑tub; add high‑value amenities (outdoor hot‑tub, parking, Wi‑Fi, TV) to meet guest expectations and increase perceived value.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your villa commands £310/night—101% higher than the city median—yet it’s only booked 33.7% of the next 90 days, leaving a substantial revenue gap you can close.
